Title: Leden
QuerySelect: SELECT u.UserID, u.DisplayName, u.Email, ISNULL(r.RoleName, '') AS RoleName, CONVERT(varchar, u.CreatedOnDate, 105) AS JoinedDate FROM UserCommunity uc INNER JOIN Users u ON u.UserID = uc.UserId LEFT JOIN Roles r ON r.RoleID = uc.RoleId WHERE uc.CommunityId = @rc_CommunityId ORDER BY u.DisplayName
QueryInsert:
DECLARE @rid INT = (SELECT RoleID FROM Roles WHERE RoleName = @RoleName AND PortalID = 0);
INSERT INTO UserCommunity (UserId, CommunityId, RoleId) VALUES (@UserID, @rc_CommunityId, @rid)
QueryDelete: DELETE FROM UserCommunity WHERE UserId = @pk AND CommunityId = @rc_CommunityId
QueryBulkDelete: DELETE FROM UserCommunity WHERE UserId IN ({ids}) AND CommunityId = @rc_CommunityId

Columns.Label: Gebruiker
Columns.Pattern: SELECT u.UserID, u.DisplayName FROM Users u INNER JOIN UserPortals up ON up.UserId = u.UserID WHERE up.PortalId = 0 AND u.UserID NOT IN (SELECT uc.UserId FROM UserCommunity uc WHERE uc.CommunityId = @rc_CommunityId) ORDER BY u.DisplayName

Columns.Label: Rol
Columns.Pattern: SELECT r.RoleName, r.RoleName FROM Roles r WHERE r.PortalID = 0 AND r.RoleID > 0 AND r.RoleName NOT LIKE 'Community -%' ORDER BY r.RoleName
